While not a literal register, the return of an int representation of multiple booleans makes it convenient to
represent this functionality as a register.

classes.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.command
documentation:
Sends an SCPI command or multiple commands to the instrument.

Args:
    commands (str):
        A serial command.
    check_errors (bool):
        Chooses whether to check for and raise errors after sending a command. True by default. kwarg.
        Optional Parameter

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.query
documentation:
Send a query to the instrument and return the response.

Args:
    queries (str):
        A serial query ending in a question mark.

Returns:
    The instrument query response as a string.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_standard_event_enable_mask
documentation:
Returns the names of the standard event enable register bits and their values.

These values determine which bits propagate to the standard event register.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_standard_event_enable_mask
documentation:
Configures values of the standard event enable register bits.

These values determine which bits propagate to the standard event register.

Args:
    register_mask (Model224StandardEventRegister):
        An StandardEventRegister class object with all bits set to a value.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.clear_interface_command
documentation:
Clears the bits of the interface and terminates all pending operations.

Clears the bits in the Status Byte Register, Standard Event Status Register, and Operation Event Register,
and terminates all pending operations. Clears the interface, but not the controller.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.reset_instrument
documentation: Sets controller parameters to power-up settings.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_service_request
documentation:
Manually enable/disable the mask of the corresponding status-flag bit in the status byte register.

Args:
    register_mask (Model224ServiceRequestRegister):
        A Model224ServiceRequestRegister class object with all bits configured.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_service_request
documentation: Returns the status byte register bits and their values as a class instance.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_status_byte
documentation: Returns the status flag bits as a class instance without resetting the register.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_self_test
documentation:
Instrument self test result completed at power up.

Returns:
    test_errors (bool):
        True means errors found, and False means no errors found.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_wait_to_continue
documentation:
Causes the IEEE-488 interface to hold off until all pending operations have been completed.

This has the same function as the set_operation_complete() method, except that it does not set the
Operation Complete event bit in the Event Status Register.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_to_factory_defaults
documentation: Sets all the settings and configurations to their factory default values.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_reading_status
documentation:
Returns the reading status of any input status flags that may be set.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to check for reading status flags.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"invalid_reading": bool, "temperature_under_range": bool, "temperature_over_range": bool,
        "sensor_units_zero": bool, "sensor_units_over_range": bool}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_kelvin_reading
documentation:
Returns the temperature value in kelvin of either channel.

Args:
    input_channel:
        Selects the channel to retrieve measurement.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (float):
        The reading of the sensor in kelvin.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_sensor_reading
documentation:
Returns the sensor reading in the sensor's units.

Args:
    input_channel:
        Selects the channel to retrieve measurement.
        Options are: Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    reading (float):
        The raw sensor reading in the units of the connected sensor.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_celsius_reading
documentation:
Returns the given input's temperature reading in degrees Celsius.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Selects input to retrieve measurement from.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (float):
        Temperature readings in degrees Celsius.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_all_inputs_celsius_reading
documentation:
Returns the temperature reading in degrees Celsius of all the inputs.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"input_a_reading": float, "input_b_reading": float, "input_c1_reading": float,
        "input_c2_reading": float, "input_c3_reading": float, "input_c4_reading": float,
        "input_c5_reading": float, "input_d1_reading": float, "input_d2_reading": float,
        "input_d3_reading": float, "input_d4_reading": float, "input_d5_reading": float}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_input_diode_excitation_current
documentation:
Sets the excitation current of a diode sensor.

Input must be configured for a diode sensor for command to work. Current defaults to 10uA.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to configure the diode excitation current for.
    diode_current (Model224DiodeExcitationCurrent):
        The excitation current for the diode sensor.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_input_diode_excitation_current
documentation:
Returns the diode excitation current for the given diode sensor.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The diode sensor input to query the current of.

Returns:
    diode_current (Model224DiodeExcitationCurrent):
        A member of the Model224DiodeExcitationCurrent enum class.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_sensor_name
documentation:
Sets a given name to a sensor on the specified channel.

Args:
    channel (str):
        Specifies which the sensor to name is on.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

    sensor_name(str):
        Name user wants to give to the sensor on the specified channel.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_sensor_name
documentation:
Returns the name of the sensor on the specified channel.

Args:
    channel (str):
        Specifies which input sensor to retrieve name of.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    name (str):
        Name associated with the sensor.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_display_contrast
documentation:
Sets the contrast level for the front panel display.

Args:
    contrast_level (int):
        Display contrast for the front panel LCD screen. Options are:
        1 - 32.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_display_contrast
documentation:
Returns the contrast level of front panel display.

Returns:
    (int):
        Contrast level of the front panel LCD screen.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_ieee_488
documentation:
Specifies the IEEE address.

Args:
    address (int):
        1-30 (0 and 31 reserved).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_ieee_488
documentation:
Returns the IEEE address set.

Returns:
    address (int):
        1-30 (0 and 31 reserved).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_led_state
documentation:
Sets the front panel LEDs to on or off.

Args:
    state (bool):
        Sets the LEDs to functional or nonfunctional. Options are:
        False for off, True for on.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_led_state
documentation:
Returns whether front panel LEDs are enabled.

Returns:
    state (bool):
        Specifies whether front panel LEDs are functional. Returns:
        False if disabled, True enabled.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_keypad_lock
documentation:
Locks or unlocks front panel keypad (except for alarms and disabling heaters).

Args:
    state (bool):
        Sets the keypad to locked or unlocked. Options are:
        False for unlocked or True for locked.
    code (int):
        Specifies 3 digit lock-out code. Options are:
        000 - 999.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_keypad_lock
documentation:
Returns the state of the keypad lock and the lock-out code.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"state": bool, "code": int}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_min_max_data
documentation:
Returns the minimum and maximum data from an input.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input to query.

Returns:
    min_max_data (dict):
        {"minimum": float, "maximum": float}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.reset_min_max_data
documentation: Resets the minimum and maximum input data.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_input_curve
documentation:
Specifies the curve an input uses for temperature conversion.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input to configure.
    curve_number (int):
        0 = none, 1-20 = standard curves, 21-59 = user curves.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_input_curve
documentation:
Returns the curve number being used for a given input.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input to query.

Returns:
    curve_number (int):
        0-59.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_website_login
documentation:
Sets the username and password to connect instrument to website.

Args:
    username (str):
        Username to set for login.
        Must be less than or equal to 15 characters.
        Method automatically puts quotation marks around string, so they are not needed in the
        string literal passed into the method.
    password (str):
        Password to set for login.
        Must be less than or equal to 15 characters.
        Method automatically puts quotation marks around string, so they are not needed in the
        string literal passed into the method.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_website_login
documentation:
Returns the set username and password for web login for the instrument.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"username": str, "password": str}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_alarm_parameters
documentation:
Configures the alarm parameters for an input.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input to configure.
    alarm_enable (bool):
        Specifies whether to turn on the alarm for the input, or turn the alarm off.
    alarm_settings (Model224AlarmParameters):
        See Model224AlarmParameters class. Optional if alarm_enable is set to False.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_alarm_parameters
documentation:
Returns the present state of all alarm parameters.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input to configure.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"alarm_enable": bool, "alarm_settings": Model224AlarmParameters}.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_alarm_status
documentation:
Returns the high state and low state of the alarm for the specified channel.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input channel to read from.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"high_state": bool, "low_state": bool}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.reset_alarm_status
documentation: Clears the high and low status of all alarms.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_curve_header
documentation:
Configures the user curve header.

Args:
    curve_number (int):
        Specifies which curve to configure.
        Options are: 21 - 59.
    curve_header (Model224CurveHeader):
        A Model224CurveHeader class object containing the desired curve information.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_curve_header
documentation:
Returns parameters set on a particular user curve header.

Args:
    curve (int):
        Specifies a curve to retrieve.
        Options are: 21 - 59.

Returns:
    header (Model224CurveHeader):
        A Model224CurveHeader class object containing the desired curve information.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_curve_data_point
documentation:
Configures a user curve point.

Args:
    curve (int or str):
        Specifies which curve to configure.
    index (int):
        Specifies the points index in the curve.
    sensor_units (float):
        Specifies sensor units for this point to 6 digits.
    temperature (float):
        Specifies the corresponding temperature in Kelvin for this point to 6 digits.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_curve_data_point
documentation:
Returns a standard or user curve data point.

Args:
    curve (int):
        Specifies which curve to query.
    index (int):
        Specifies the points index in the curve.

Returns:
    curve_point (tuple):
        (sensor_units: float, temp_value: float)).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.delete_curve
documentation:
Deletes the user curve.

Args:
    curve (int):
        Specifies a user curve to delete.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.generate_and_apply_soft_cal_curve
documentation:
Creates a SoftCal curve from 1-3 temperature/sensor points and a standard curve.

Inputs generated curve into the given curve number.

Args:
    source_curve (Model224SoftCalSensorTypes):
        The standard curve to use to generate the SoftCal curve from along with calibration points.
    curve_number (int):
        The curve number to save the generated curve to.
        Options are: 21 - 59.
    serial_number (str):
        Serial number of the user curve.
        Maximum of 10 characters.
    calibration_point_1 (tuple):
        Tuple of two floats in the form (temperature_value, sensor_value).
    calibration_point_2 (tuple):
        Tuple of two floats in the form (temperature_value, sensor_value). Optional Parameter.
    calibration_point_3 (tuple):
        Tuple of two floats in the form (temperature_value, sensor_value). Optional parameter.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_curve
documentation:
Returns a list of all the data points in a particular curve.

Args:
    curve (int):
        Specifies which curve to set.

Return:
    data_points (list):
        A list containing every point in the curve represented as a tuple
        (sensor_units: float, temp_value: float).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_curve
documentation:
Method to define a user curve using a list of data points.

Args:
    curve (int):
        Specifies which curve to set.
    data_points (list):
        A list containing every point in the curve represented as a tuple
            (sensor_units: float, temp_value: float).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_relay_status
documentation:
Returns whether the specified relay is On or Off.

Args:
    relay_channel (int):
        The relay channel to query.
        Options are: 1 or 2.

Returns:
    (bool):
        True if relay is on, False if relay is off.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_filter
documentation:
Enables or disables a filter for the readings of the specified input channel.

Filter is a running average that smooths input readings exponentially.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to set or disable a filter for.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).
    filter_enabled (bool):
        Enables or disables a filter for the input channel.
        True for enabled, False for disabled.
    number_of_points (int):
        Specifies the number of points used for the filter.
        Inputting a larger number of points will slow down the instrument's response to changes in
        temperature.
        Options are: 2 - 64
        Optional if disabling the filter function.
    filter_reset_threshold (int):
        Specifies the limit for restarting the filter, represented by a percent of the full scale reading.
        If raw reading differs from filtered value by more than this threshold, filter averaging resets.
        Options are: 1% - 10%.
        Optional if disabling the filter function.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_filter
documentation:
Retrieves information about the filter set on the specified input channel.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to query for filter information.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"filter_enabled": bool, "number_of_points": int, "filter_reset_threshold": int}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.configure_input
documentation:
Configures a sensor for measurement input readings.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to configure the input for.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

    settings (Model224InputSensorSettings):
        Object of the Model224InputSensorSettings containing information for sensor setup.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.disable_input
documentation:
Disables the selected input channel.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to disable.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_input_configuration
documentation:
Returns the configuration settings of the sensor at the specified input channel.

Args:
    input_channel (str):
        The input to query.
        Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).

Returns:
    (Model224InputSensorSettings):
        Object of type Model224InputSensorSettings containing information about the sensor at the given
        input_channel.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.select_remote_interface
documentation:
Selects the remote interface to use for communications.

Args:
    remote_interface (Model224RemoteInterface):
        Object of enum type Model224RemoteInterface, representing the type of interface used for
        communications.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_remote_interface
documentation:
Returns the remote interface being used for communications.

Returns:
    (Model224RemoteInterface):
        Object of enum type Model224RemoteInterface representing the interface being used for
        communications.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.select_interface_mode
documentation:
Selects the mode for the remote interface being used.

Args:
    interface_mode (Model224InterfaceMode):
        Object of enum type Model224InterfaceMode representing the desired communication mode.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_interface_mode
documentation:
Returns the mode of the remote interface.

Returns:
    (Model224InterfaceMode):
        Object of enum type Model224InterfaceMode representing the communication mode.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_display_field_settings
documentation:
Configures a display field in custom display mode.

Args:
    field (int):
        Specifies which display field to configure.
        Options are: 1 - 8.
    input_channel (Model224InputChannel):
        Defines which input to display.
    display_units (Model224DisplayFieldUnits):
        Defines which units to display reading in.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_display_field_settings
documentation:
Returns the settings of a single display field in custom display mode.

Args:
    field (int):
        Specifies the display field to query.
        Options are: 1 - 8.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"input_channel": Model224InputChannel, "display_units": Model224DisplayFieldUnits}

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.configure_display
documentation:
Configures the display of the instrument.

Args:
    display_mode (Model224DisplayMode):
        Defines what mode to set the display in.
        Mode either defines which input to display, or sets up a custom display using display fields.
    number_of_fields (Model224NumberOfFields):
        Defines the number of display locations to display.
        Only valid if mode is set to CUSTOM.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_display_configuration
documentation:
Returns the mode of the display.

If display mode is Custom, this method also returns the number of display fields in the custom display.

Returns:
    (dict):
        {"display_mode": DisplayMode, "number_of_fields": NumberOfFields}.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.turn_relay_on
documentation:
Turns the specified relay on.

Args:
    relay_number (int):
        The relay to turn on. Options are: 1 or 2.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.turn_relay_off
documentation:
Turns the specified relay off.

Args:
    relay_number (int):
        The relay to turn off. Options are: 1 or 2.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.set_relay_alarms
documentation:
Sets a relay to turn on and off automatically based on the state of the alarm of the specified input channel.

Args:
    relay_number (int):
        The relay to configure. Options are: 1 or 2.
    activating_input_channel (str):
        Specifies which input alarm activates the relay when the relay is in alarm mode.
        Only applies if ALARM mode is chosen. Options are: A, B, C(1 - 5), D(1 - 5).
    alarm_relay_trigger_type (Model224RelayControlAlarm):
        Specifies the type of alarm that triggers the relay.
        Only applies if ALARM mode is chosen.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_relay_alarm_control_parameters
documentation:
Returns the relay alarm configuration for either of the two configurable relays.

Relay must be configured for alarm mode to retrieve parameters.

Args:
    relay_number (int):
        Specifies which relay to query. Options are: 1 or 2.

Return:
    (dict):
        {"activating_input_channel": str, "alarm_relay_trigger_type": Model224RelayControlAlarm}.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_224.Model224.get_relay_control_mode
documentation:
Returns the configured mode of the specified relay.

Args:
    relay_number (int):
        Specifies which relay to query. Options are: 1 or 2.

Returns:
    (Model224RelayControlMode):
        The configured mode of the relay, represented as an object of the enum type
        Model224RelayControlMode.
A class object representing the Lake Shore Model 224 temperature monitor.

modules.name: lakeshore.model_155
documentation: Implements functionality unique to the Lake Shore 155 Precision Source.

classes.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSourceOperationRegister
documentation: Class object representing the operation status register.

classes.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSourceQuestionableRegister
documentation: Class object representing the questionable status register.

classes.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.sweep_voltage
documentation:
Sweep source output voltage parameters based on list arguments.

Args:
    dwell_time (float):
        The length of time in seconds to wait at each parameter combination.
        Note that the update rate will be limited by the SCPI communication response time.
        The response time is usually on the order of 10-30 milliseconds.
    offset_values (list):
        DC offset values in volts to sweep over.
    amplitude_values (list):
        Peak to peak values in volts to sweep over.
    frequency_values (list):
        Frequency values in Hertz to sweep over.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.sweep_current
documentation:
Sweep the source output current parameters based on list arguments

Args:
    dwell_time (float):
        The length of time in seconds to wait at each parameter combination.
        Note that the update rate will be limited by the SCPI communication response time.
        The response time is usually on the order of 10-30 milliseconds.
    offset_values (list):
        DC offset values in volts to sweep over.
    amplitude_values (list):
        Peak to peak values in volts to sweep over.
    frequency_values (list):
        Frequency values in Hertz to sweep over.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.enable_output
documentation: Turns on the source output.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.disable_output
documentation: Turns off the source output.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_output
documentation:
Configure the source output on or off.

Args:
    output_on (bool):
        Turns the source output on when True, off when False.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.route_terminals
documentation:
Configures whether the source output is routed through the front or rear connections.

Args:
    output_connections_location (str):
        Valid options are: "REAR" (Output is routed out the rear connections), and
        "FRONT" (Output is routed out the front connections).

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.output_sine_current
documentation:
Configures and enables the source output to be a sine wave current source.

Args:
    amplitude (float):
        The peak current amplitude value in amps.
    frequency (float):
        The source frequency value in hertz.
    offset (float):
        The DC offset current in amps.
    phase (float):
        Shifts the phase of the output relative to the reference out. Must be between -180 and 180 degrees.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.output_sine_voltage
documentation:
Configures and enables the source output to be a sine wave voltage source.

Args:
    amplitude (float):
        The peak voltage amplitude value in volts.
    frequency (float):
        The source frequency value in hertz.
    offset (float):
        The DC offset voltage in volts.
    phase (float):
        Shifts the phase of the output relative to the reference out. Must be between -180 and 180 degrees.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.output_dc_current
documentation:
Configures the source output to be a DC current source.

Args:
    current_level (float):
        The output current level in amps.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.output_dc_voltage
documentation:
Configures the source output to be a DC current source.

Args:
    voltage_level (float):
        The output voltage level in volts.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.get_output_settings
documentation: Returns a dictionary of the output settings.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.enable_autorange
documentation: Enables the instrument to automatically select the best range for the given output parameters.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.disable_autorange
documentation: Enables the instrument to automatically select the best range for the given output parameters.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_current_range
documentation:
Manually sets the current range when autorange is disabled.

Args:
    current_range (str):
        The range in amps. Valid ranges are: "100E-3", "10E-3", "1E-3", "100E-6", "10E-6", and "1E-6".

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_voltage_range
documentation:
Manually sets the voltage range when autorange is disabled.

Args:
    voltage_range (str):
        The range in volts. Valid ranges are: "100", "10", "1", "0.1", and "0.01".

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_current_limit
documentation:
Sets the highest settable current output value when in current mode.

Args:
    current_limit (float):
        The maximum settable current in amps. Must be between 0 and 100 milli-amps.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_voltage_limit
documentation:
Sets the highest settable voltage output value when in voltage mode.

Args:
    voltage_limit (float):
        The maximum settable voltage in amps. Must be between 0 and 100 volts.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_current_mode_voltage_protection
documentation:
Sets the maximum voltage level permitted by the instrument when sourcing current.

Args:
    max_voltage (float):
        The maximum permissible voltage. Must be between 1 and 100 volts.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.set_voltage_mode_current_protection
documentation:
Sets the maximum current level permitted by the instrument when sourcing voltage.

Args:
    max_current (float):
        The maximum permissible voltage. Must be between 1 and 100 volts.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.enable_ac_high_voltage_compliance
documentation: Configures the current mode compliance voltage to be 100V in AC output modes.

methods.name: lakeshore.model_155.PrecisionSource.disable_ac_high_voltage_compliance
documentation: Configures the current mode compliance voltage to be 10V in AC output modes.
A class object representing a Lake Shore 155 precision I/V source.

modules.name: lakeshore.teslameter
documentation: Implements functionality unique to the Lake Shore F41 and F71 Teslameters.

classes.name: lakeshore.teslameter.TeslameterOperationRegister
documentation: Class object representing the operation status register.

classes.name: lakeshore.teslameter.TeslameterQuestionableRegister
documentation: Class object representing the questionable status register.

classes.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.stream_buffered_data
documentation:
Yield a generator object for the buffered field data.

Useful for getting the data in real time when doing a lengthy acquisition.

Args:
    length_of_time_in_seconds (float):
        The period of time over which to stream the data.
    sample_rate_in_ms (int):
        The averaging window (sampling period) of the instrument.

Returns:
   A generator object that returns the data as datapoint tuples.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_buffered_data_points
documentation:
Returns a list of named tuples that contain the buffered data.

Args:
    length_of_time_in_seconds (float):
        The period of time over which to collect the data.
    sample_rate_in_ms (int):
        The averaging window (sampling period) of the instrument.

Returns:
   The data as a list of datapoint tuples.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.log_buffered_data_to_file
documentation:
Creates or appends a CSV file with the buffered data and excel-friendly timestamps.

Args:
    length_of_time_in_seconds (float):
        The period of time over which to collect the data.
    sample_rate_in_ms (int):
        The averaging window (sampling period) of the instrument.
    file (file_object):
        Field measurement data will be written to this file object in a CSV format.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_dc_field
documentation: Returns the DC field reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_dc_field_xyz
documentation: Returns the DC field reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_rms_field
documentation: Returns the RMS field reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_rms_field_xyz
documentation: Returns the RMS field reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_frequency
documentation: Returns the field frequency reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_max_min
documentation: Returns the maximum and minimum field readings respectively.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_max_min_peaks
documentation: Returns the maximum and minimum peak field readings respectively.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.reset_max_min
documentation: Resets the maximum and minimum field readings to the present field reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_temperature
documentation: Returns the temperature reading.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_probe_information
documentation: Returns a dictionary of probe data.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_relative_field
documentation: Returns the relative field value.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.tare_relative_field
documentation: Copies the current field reading to the relative baseline value.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_relative_field_baseline
documentation: Returns the relative field baseline value.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_relative_field_baseline
documentation:
Configures the relative baseline value.

Args:
    baseline_field (float):
        A field units value that will act as the zero field for the relative measurement.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_field_measurement_setup
documentation:
Configures the field measurement settings.

Args:
    mode (str):
        Modes are as follows:
        "DC",
        "AC" (0.1 - 500 Hz), and
        "HIFR" (50 Hz - 100 kHz).
    autorange (bool):
        Chooses whether the instrument automatically selects the best range for the measured value.
    expected_field (float):
        When autorange is False, the expected_field is the largest field expected to be measured.
        It sets the lowest instrument field range capable of measuring the value.
    averaging_samples (int):
        The number of field samples to average. Each sample is 10 milliseconds of field information.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_measurement_setup
documentation: Returns the mode, autoranging state, range, and number of averaging samples as a dictionary.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_temperature_compensation
documentation:
Configures how temperature compensation is applied to the field readings.

Args:
    temperature_source (str):
        Determines where the temperature measurement is drawn from. Options are:
        "PROBE" (Compensation is based on measurement of a thermistor in the probe),
        "MTEM" (Compensation is based on a manual temperature value provided by the user),
        "NONE" (Temperature compensation is not applied).
    manual_temperature (float):
        Sets the temperature provided by the user for MTEMP (manual temperature) source in Celsius.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_temperature_compensation_source
documentation: Returns the source of temperature measurement for field compensation.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_temperature_compensation_manual_temp
documentation: Returns the manual temperature setting value in Celsius.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_field_units
documentation:
Configures the field measurement units of the instrument.

Args:
    units (str):
        A unit of magnetic field. Options are:
        "TESLA", or
        "GAUSS".

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_units
documentation: Returns the magnetic field units of the instrument.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_field_control_limits
documentation:
Configures the limits of the field control output.

Args:
    voltage_limit (float):
        The maximum voltage permitted at the field control output. Must be between 0 and 10V.
    slew_rate_limit (float):
        The maximum rate of change of the field control output voltage in volts per second.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_control_limits
documentation: Returns the field control output voltage limit and slew rate limit.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_field_control_output_mode
documentation:
Configure the field control mode and state.

Args:
    mode (str):
        Determines whether the field control is in open or closed loop mode. Options:
        "CLLOOP" (closed loop control), or
        "OPLOOP" (open loop control, voltage output).
    output_enabled (bool):
        Turn the field control voltage output on or off.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_control_output_mode
documentation: Returns the mode and state of the field control output.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_field_control_pid
documentation:
Configures the closed loop control parameters of the field control output.

Args:
    gain (float):
        Also known as P or Proportional in PID control.
        This controls how strongly the control output reacts to the present error.
        Note that the integral value is multiplied by the gain value.
    integral (float):
        Also known as I or Integral in PID control.
        This controls how strongly the control output reacts to the past error *history*.
    ramp_rate (float):
        This value controls how quickly the present field set-point will transition to a new set-point.
        The ramp rate is configured in field units per second.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_control_pid
documentation: Returns the gain, integral, and ramp rate.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_field_control_setpoint
documentation: Sets the field control setpoint value in field units.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_control_setpoint
documentation: Returns the field control setpoint.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_field_control_open_loop_voltage
documentation: Sets the field control open loop voltage.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_field_control_open_loop_voltage
documentation: Returns the field control open loop voltage.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_analog_output
documentation: Configures what signal is provided by the analog output BNC.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_analog_output_signal
documentation:
Configures what signal is provided by the analog output BNC.

Args:
    analog_output_mode (str):
        Configures what signal is provided by the analog output BNC. Options:
        "OFF" (output off),
        "XRAW" (raw amplified X channel Hall voltage),
        "YRAW" (raw amplified Y channel Hall voltage),
        "ZRAW" (raw amplified Z channel Hall voltage),
        "XCOR" (Corrrected X channel field measurement),
        "YCOR" (Corrected Y channel field measurement),
        "ZCOR" (Corrected Z channel field measurement), or
        "MCOR" (Corrected magnitude field measurement)

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_corrected_analog_output_scaling
documentation:
Configures the conversion between field reading and analog output voltage.

Args:
    scale_factor (float):
        Scale factor in volts per unit field.
    baseline (float):
        The field value at which the analog output voltage is zero.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_corrected_analog_output_scaling
documentation: Returns the scale factor and baseline of the corrected analog out.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_analog_output
documentation: Returns what signal is being provided by the analog output.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_analog_output_signal
documentation: Returns what signal is being provided by the analog output.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.enable_high_frequency_filters
documentation: Applies filtering to the high frequency RMS measurements.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.disable_high_frequency_filters
documentation: Turns off filtering of the high frequency mode measurements.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_frequency_filter_type
documentation:
Configures which filter is applied to the high frequency measurements.

Args:
    filter_type (str):
        Options: "LPASS" (low pass filter), "HPASS" (high pass filter), or "BPASS" (band pass filter).

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_frequency_filter_type
documentation: Returns the type of filter that is or will be applied to the high frequency measurements.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_low_pass_filter_cutoff
documentation: Returns the cutoff frequency setting of the low pass filter.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_low_pass_filter_cutoff
documentation:
Configures the low pass filter cutoff.

Args:
    cutoff_frequency (float):
        Options: NONE, F10, F30, F100, F300, F1000, F3000, or F10000
        F10 = 10 Hz, etc.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_high_pass_filter_cutoff
documentation: Returns the cutoff frequency setting of the low pass filter.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_high_pass_filter_cutoff
documentation:
Configures the high pass filter cutoff.

Args:
    cutoff_frequency (float):
        Options: NONE, F10, F30, F100, F300, F1000, F3000, or F10000
        F10 = 10 Hz, etc.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_band_pass_filter_center
documentation: Returns the center of the band pass filter.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_band_pass_filter_center
documentation:
Configures the band pass filter parameters.

Args:
    center_frequency (float):
        The frequency at which the gain of the filter is 1.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.enable_qualifier
documentation: Enables the qualifier.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.disable_qualifier
documentation: Disables the qualifier.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.is_qualifier_condition_met
documentation: Returns whether the qualifier condition is met.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.enable_qualifier_latching
documentation: Enables the qualifier condition latching.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.disable_qualifier_latching
documentation: Disables the qualifier condition latching.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_qualifier_latching_setting
documentation: Returns whether the qualifier latches.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.set_qualifier_latching_setting
documentation:
Sets whether the qualifier latches.

Args:
    latching (bool):
        Determines whether the qualifier latches.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.reset_qualifier_latch
documentation: Resets the condition status of the qualifier.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.get_qualifier_configuration
documentation: Returns the threshold mode and field threshold values.

methods.name: lakeshore.teslameter.Teslameter.configure_qualifier
documentation:
Sets the threshold condition of the qualifier.

Args:
    mode (str):
        The type of threshold condition used by the qualifier.
        Options: "OVER", "UNDER", "BETWEEN", "OUTSIDE", "ABSBETWEEN", or "ABSOUTSIDE".
    lower_field (float):
        The lower field value threshold used by the qualifier.
    upper_field (float):
        The upper field value threshold used by the qualifier. Not used for OVER or UNDER.
A class object representing a Lake Shore F41 or F71 Teslameter.
